title: Prerender Verification Report
description: Machine-readable output from the post-prerender head-tag verifier.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the report was generated.

siteOrigin.description: Canonical origin used for self-reference checks.

passed.description: Number of routes that passed every head-tag check.

failed.description: Number of routes with at least one head-tag failure.

allPassed.description: True when no failures were found across all checked routes.

rerunCommand.description: Shell command to re-verify only the routes that failed.

file.description: Absolute path to the prerendered HTML file that was checked.

passed.description: True when this route had zero failures.

failures.description: List of head-tag failures for this route.

route.description: Route path where the failure occurred.

check.description: Name of the check that failed (e.g. og:image, canonical).
